item.title: rbw-env: Export environment variables from Bitwarden
item.description: Using rbw to export environment variables from Bitwarden, useful for setting API keys securely without storing them on disk.
item.dc:creator: Pablo Caro

item.title: kitty-rbw: Fast Bitwarden access from your kitty terminal
item.description: Introducing kitty-rbw, a "kitten" for the kitty terminal that allows you to search and use rbw (Bitwarden) credentials instantly using fzf.
item.dc:creator: Pablo Caro

item.title: rbw: The Bitwarden terminal client you should be using
item.description: How to install and configure rbw, a Rust implementation of the Bitwarden client, and how to integrate it into your workflows with pi-agent.
item.dc:creator: Pablo Caro
